commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Then the children of Judah came unto Joshua in Gilgal: and Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenizzite said unto him, You know the thing that the LORD said unto Moses the man of God concerning me and you in Kadeshbarnea. Jephone was the father of Caleb. Esron and Cenez probably some of his ancestors, 1 Paralipomenon ii. , and Numbers xxxiii. What Caleb here asserts, must have been delivered by word of mouth, in the hearing of the people, Deuteronomy i. Moses declared not that Caleb was to have the whole country but that he should enter into it, and possess the environs of Hebron.
